## Security/privacy checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, or production connection strings were added.
- [ ] Sensitive user identity is not exposed publicly.
- [ ] Exact location is not exposed without consent.
- [ ] Sensitive actions include audit expectations where applicable.
- [ ] AI output is treated as decision support only.
